tool_input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add comprehensive crypto research reports (Feb 23, 2026)

Multi-agent AI research across 3 model tiers (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus):
- Market overview: Top 20 crypto by market cap with live prices
- Emerging coin analysis: Early-stage coins with growth potential
- Macro-crypto correlations: Fed policy, inflation, DXY impact on sectors
- Investment plays: Risk-scored plays with entry/exit strategies
- BLOX platform analysis: Dutch exchange coin availability (Opus run)
- Investable coins summaries per tier

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
